items.title: UnitedHealth Leadership Shift Tests Cost Controls And Legal Risk Outlook
items.description: UnitedHealth Group’s Optum unit has seen a leadership change, with longtime executive Heather Cianfrocco departing and a new CEO stepping in. The shakeup comes as the company applies strict limits on employee pay raises, conducts layoffs, and trims its clinic footprint to manage costs. UnitedHealth is also dealing with a class action lawsuit tied to securities fraud allegations, adding legal pressure to existing profit concerns, particularly around Medicare Advantage. For investors watching...

items.title: UnitedHealth's Stock Might Not Rally Until This Number Improves
items.description: The company's rising costs are a big reason investors have been dumping the stock of late.
